nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Internal-call (INTERNAL_EMAIL_SECRET). Reads video_renders by id, calls HeyGen v2/v3 API to render with persona avatar + look + voice + script, persists heygen_video_id + status='rendering'. HeyGen processes async (5-30 min) and calls back to clx-heygen-webhook-v1 (B3) when complete.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ video_inputs: [{ character: { type: 'avatar', avatar_id: $json.custom_avatar_id || $env[$json.avatar_env_var] || 'PLACEHOLDER_AVATAR_ID', avatar_style: 'normal' }, voice: { type: 'text', input_text: $json.script, voice_id: $env[$json.voice_env_var] || 'PLACEHOLDER_VOICE_ID' }, background: { type: 'color', value: '#FFFFFF' } }], dimension: { width: 1280, height: 720 }, callback_id: $json.video_render_id }) }}

nodes.name: HeyGen Render
nodes.notes: POST to HeyGen v2 /video/generate. callback_id is set to video_render_id so the callback handler (B3) can look up which render to update. Avatar/voice IDs resolve from env vars (per-persona) or per-client custom_avatar_id (Scale tier).

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: !$json._failed, video_render_id: $json.video_render_id, heygen_video_id: $json.heygen_video_id || null, error: $json.error || null }) }}
